zHstatements : define_stmt
                  | define_stmt statements
    
p_statements:
zOdefine_stmt : DEFINE OPAREN TICK NAME SQUOTE COMMA TICK list SQUOTE CPAREN

z2list : NAME
            | OBRACE names CBRACE
    r
p_listJ
z+names : NAME
             | NAME names

p_namesS

linenor
p_error\

all_perms.sptz%define(`foo',`{ read write append }')a2
define(`all_filesystem_perms',`{ mount remount unmount getattr relabelfrom relabelto transition associate quotamod quotaget }')
